seoTitle: Deauville vs Dee Why — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Deauville and Dee Why. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Deauville vs Dee Why: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Deauville and Dee Why.
heading: Deauville vs Dee Why — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Deauville, New South Wales and Dee Why, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Deauville has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Dee Why (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Deauville or Dee Why safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Deauville has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Dee Why scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Deauville scores 36/100 for bushfire risk. Dee Why scores 23/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Deauville or Dee Why?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Deauville has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
